items.summary: Fix the YouTube channel connection status display so that when a user has already connected their YouTube channel (i.e., valid Google OAuth credentials are stored in the backend), the ChannelConnection component correctly reflects the connected state instead of showing 'not connected'. Investigate the useYouTubeChannel hook and the OAuthCallback flow to ensure the stored credentials are being read and the connected status is correctly derived and returned.

Fix the clip download functionality so that clicking the download button on a ClipCard successfully triggers a file download in the browser. Investigate the useDownloadClip hook to ensure it correctly fetches the download URL from the backend and that the programmatic browser download trigger (e.g., anchor element click) works as expected. Ensure error states are surfaced to the user if download fails.

In the admin panel's user management section (UserStatusManagement component), display each user's full Principal ID alongside their existing user ID. Add a copy-to-clipboard button next to the Principal ID so admins can easily copy it. The Principal ID should be visible in the user list/search results and in any user detail view within the component.

In the admin panel's clip management section (any clip listing/management view available to admins), display the owner's full Principal ID for each clip alongside existing owner information. Add a copy-to-clipboard button next to each Principal ID so admins can easily copy it.
